title: EC irons spells compat
description: Adds compatibility between Expanded combat and Iron’s Spells and spellbooks
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-irons-spells-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Irons Spells and Spellbooks Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e9e9f3ffd9c1cde9e3107883981af4f67928bb.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Iron's Spells and Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks). #### Adds gauntlets for these armor materials: Archevoker, \ Cryomamcer, \ Cultist, \ Electromancer, \ Netherite Battlemage, \ Plagued, \ Priest, \ Pyromancer, \ Scarecrow, \ Shadow Walker, \ and Wandering Magician \ \ \ Click the banner to get the discount: [![Bisect Hosting Promotional](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/91cdbb92-a3db-4f62-a182-239fe5589b2a.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/userofbricks)
